product.title: Korean Color Changing Foundation Stick 2-in-1 Waterproof & Long-Lasting Hydrating Makeup,with Brush for Lumine Skin, Dual-Ended Foundation -Concealer Stick, Portable for Easy Daily Use and Travel
featureBullets: Innovative Lumine Skin Foundation Stick – Adapts to Your Tone Discover the magic of Korean beauty with this smart Color-Changing Foundation Stick. It starts as a white balm and transforms upon contact, adjusting to match your unique skin tone for a truly personalized, natural-looking medium coverage. The Lumine Skin Foundation formula creates the perfect, even base.

Achieve the Coveted Lumine Skin Glow – Hydrating & Long-Lasting Unlock a radiant, lit-from-within complexion. This hydrating Korean foundation stick is infused with moisturizers to nourish skin all day. It delivers a fresh, Lumine Skin-inspired dewy finish that feels weightless and comfortable, resisting cakiness for a long-lasting, healthy glow.

All-in-One Lumine Skin Stick with Detachable Brush Streamline your makeup routine with this brilliant 2-in-1 design. One end is the color-changing Lumine Skin foundation stick, the other is a premium, detachable brush for hygienic, streak-free blending. This Lumine Skin stick makes achieving a flawless, airbrushed application effortless and mess-free.

Your Perfect Travel Companion for Flawless Touch-Ups Designed for life on the go. This sleek, compact foundation stick is leak-proof and incredibly portable. Slip the Lumine Skin foundation stick into your smallest bag for quick, precise touch-ups anytime, anywhere. It’s the essential tool for maintaining perfect coverage from your morning routine to evening out.

Gentle, Buildable Coverage for Every Skin Type Crafted with a gentle, skin-respecting formula, the YOUGAANY Model 202 foundation stick is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive. Its breathable, blendable texture offers buildable coverage without clogging pores, ensuring all-day comfort and a beautiful enhancement of your natural skin.
product.description: It initially appears white, but after being applied to the face, it adjusts according to your skin tone to provide a smooth and even coverage.

specification.value: Adapts to tone, hydrating, long-lasting coverage
#42,001 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #372 in Foundation Makeup

reviews.reviewText: Wow! Perfect color match achieved! The foundation stick is white itself but the foundation changes color once you work it into your skin. Great coverage, from light to heavier if you apply more. I like to even out my skin tone just a little bit but for the freckles to still show. This foundation allows that! If I want heavier coverage it works wonders as well. Also feels very moisturizing and doesn't collect in wrinkles at all. Highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 23, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Way too oily with zero coverage
reviews.reviewText: I thought I would try this make up stick since it had a higher rating than the other one I tried. It is basically just soft oil that smells like liquid bubble soap. It had practically no coverage. It looked like I rubbed baby oil on my skin with a teeny tiny bit of tint. I read it can be buildable, so to give it the benefit of a doubt, I waited for it to “dry” for a bit and then tried to add another layer. It just smudged the first layer around. Try one that is more cream and less oil.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I've been using it for several days and I like it because it adapts well to my skin tone and gives a natural finish with a healthy glow without feeling heavy. It's easy to apply and convenient for touch-ups during the day, and the coverage feels light but enough for an even look. I'm quite happy with the results, and I will continue using it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This product absolutely astonished me. Before applying its white and as soon as it hit my skin it visibly changed to camouflage to my skin tone right away. The product is creamy and moisturizing and feels light which is perfect for my dry but acne prone skin. I didn’t even need to pair this with a concealer as the coverage is optimal. I’m actually beyond pleased and impressed with this product and am so happy I tried this out! Never using a different foundation ever again
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Excellent foundation—it adapts to my skin tone perfectly. At first it looks white, but then it blends right in with the skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This color foundation stick is very creamy and moisturizing. It has a great coverage, my skin feels calm and protected al day. It give a pretty natural glow. I recommend
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: If you want that perfect lumine skin look, get this white foundation stick! It applies so easily—just swipe, blend with the brush, and go. My skin looks radiant and feels hydrated all day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Great value! This color changing foundation stick is moisturizing and the coverage is buildable. It matches my skin tone flawlessly and the brush means I don't need extra tools.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026
